purpose.why: Covers authentication flow, credential validation, MFA, and session token generation, plus notes stubbed functions, but omits explicit mention of rate limiting in the one-sentence summary.

functions.why: All 10 ground truth functions correctly identified with accurate purposes and call relationships.

security.why: Weak hash algorithm correctly identified; rate limiting issue identified but severity rated high instead of medium; plaintext session token not mentioned.

dataFlow.why: Covers main linear path through all key steps but omits branching logic for valid/invalid password paths.

variables.why: sessionDuration and maxAttempts correctly identified with accurate values; also found expectedHash=42.
